response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior IC with strong full-stack and tooling exposure across many languages and has run workshops/courses, but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no explicit tenure leading a team of engineers, and limited evidence of developer-tools/build-systems/test-infra ownership at the scale required. There is also no mobile-platform ecosystem experience. The role explicitly requires 2+ years people management and 3+ years technical leadership in developer tooling, which are not demonstrated.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Track record building tooling and CI/CD infra (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory, test runners like Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong teaching/mentoring signal via workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, and conference talks
concerns: No explicit people-management or line-management experience (no direct reports, no performance reviews, no 1:1s mentioned)
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale (iOS/Android build systems, large mobile org tooling)
Developer-tools work is fragmented across side projects rather than a sustained 3+ year role owning build/test infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
No large-scale mobile platform ecosystem exposure
